seo.title: RabbitMQ Monitoring Features: Live Queues, Alerts, Analytics
seo.description: Explore Qarote's RabbitMQ monitoring features: live queue tracking, smart alerting, performance analytics, multi-server support, and queue management in one dashboard.

hero.title: Everything you need to monitor RabbitMQ
hero.subtitle: One dashboard for all your RabbitMQ servers. Replaces the management plugin, simpler than Prometheus + Grafana.

liveMonitoring.title: Live queue monitoring
liveMonitoring.description: Real-time queue depth, message rates, and consumer counts at a glance. Visual indicators highlight healthy, warning, and critical states so you never miss a degradation.
liveMonitoring.point1: Message rates: publish, deliver, acknowledge per second
liveMonitoring.point2: Consumer utilization and queue age tracking
liveMonitoring.point3: Instant visual feedback for queue health

alerting.title: Smart alerting system
alerting.description: Configurable thresholds per queue and per server. Get notified before problems become outages.

analytics.title: Performance analytics
analytics.description: Historical charts for message throughput, queue depth, and node resources. Spot trends and plan capacity with confidence.
analytics.point1: Customizable time ranges: 1 hour to 30 days
analytics.point2: Memory, disk, file descriptor, and CPU tracking

queueManagement.title: Queue management
queueManagement.description: Purge, delete, and create queues from the UI. Inspect bindings, view topology, and publish test messages without touching the command line.
queueManagement.point2: Message publishing for testing and debugging

multiServer.title: Multi-server support
multiServer.description: Connect multiple RabbitMQ instances from different environments. One unified view across staging, production, and development.

builtForDevs.title: Built for developers
builtForDevs.description: No YAML configuration. No Prometheus or Grafana to maintain. Connect your RabbitMQ server in 60 seconds with a connection string.
builtForDevs.point2: Open source Community Edition on GitHub

managementPlugin.title: vs RabbitMQ Management Plugin
managementPlugin.description: Modern UI, alerting, and multi-server support that the default plugin lacks.

prometheus.title: vs Prometheus + Grafana
prometheus.description: Same insights without the infrastructure overhead. 60-second setup vs hours of configuration.

cta.title: Ready to monitor your RabbitMQ servers?
cta.subtitle: Start with the free Community plan. No credit card required.
